basic_details.job_title: DRDO DIBT Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies (DRDO DIBT)
basic_details.short_information: Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies (DRDO DIBT) has published the Paid Intern Notification 2026 under Advt. No. DIBT/HRD/01/Paid Internship/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Paid Intern positions. Candidates holding Final Year M.Sc. in Biotechnology or Microbiology from a recognized Indian University/Institute are eligible to apply through DRDO Official Website. The application process is active up to 15 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Final Year M.Sc. in Biotechnology or Microbiology from recognized Indian University/Institute
qualification.details: Final Year M.Sc. in Biotechnology or Microbiology from a recognized Indian University/Institute.

selection_process: Academic merit with 85% & above marks or >8.5 CGPA on a scale of 10
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DIBT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
